description:
Create a SuiteCRM email template for customer service agents responding to warranty claims with the following details:

Name: Warranty Claim Response
Description: Standard response template for warranty claim cases
Subject: Re: Your Warranty Claim - Case #$acase_case_number

Body:
Dear $contact_first_name,

Thank you for reaching out regarding your warranty claim (Case #$acase_case_number).

We have received your request and our team is currently reviewing the details. A representative will be in touch within 2 business days with an update on your claim status.

If you have any additional documentation or questions in the meantime, please do not hesitate to reply to this email.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

The merge variables $contact_first_name and $acase_case_number must appear literally in the template.
